steps: Go to https://console.upstash.com and sign up or log in (supports GitHub, Google, email)
In the left sidebar, click on your account name or 'Account'
Click 'Management API' in the account settings
Enter a name for the key and optionally restrict its permissions
Click 'Create' and copy the API key
Use Basic auth: base64('your-email:your-api-key') in the Authorization header

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Upstash management API key. Used with Basic auth: base64(email:api_key)

notes: The management API uses HTTP Basic auth: Authorization: Basic base64(email:api_key)
Free tier available: up to 10,000 commands/day per Redis database
Individual Redis databases have their own REST tokens (separate from the management API key)
The management API key is for creating/listing databases; Redis REST tokens are for executing commands
Upstash also offers Kafka and QStash (message queuing) services

test_endpoint.description: List all Redis databases in the account
